product_overview: Te Form Sucks is a Next.js-based interactive quiz application designed to help students practice Japanese verb and adjective conjugations. It features pre-set and custom quiz configurations, sound and theme toggles, and comprehensive conjugation reference materials.
core_goals: Provide an engaging platform for learning Japanese conjugation focusing on verbs and adjectives.
Support multiple quiz modes including multiple choice, fill-in-the-blank, and typing.
Allow users to select from preset quizzes or customize their own quiz parameters.
Offer accessibility and user preference controls such as sound muting and theme switching.
Ensure quiz progress and user custom settings persist across sessions via localStorage.
Deliver responsive and smooth user experience across devices with animated transitions and immediate feedback.
Include comprehensive grammar and conjugation cheat sheets for quick reference.
key_features: Landing page with hero section and navigation hub linking to quizzes, sound and theme controls.
Quiz hub presenting preset quizzes with categories and a custom quiz builder with toggle options for word groups, verb/adjective types, targets, and question modes.
Interactive quiz engine supporting random question generation, answer validation, correction flow, and multiple answer modes (multiple choice, fill blank, typing).
Japanese conjugation logic to handle different verb/adjective types, conjugation rules, accepted answer variants, and answer normalization.
Cheat sheet page providing grammar and conjugation references with examples and badges.
Sound toggle that persists mute state and manages feedback/transition audio with user controls.
Theme toggle storing and applying light/dark mode preferences consistently.
Reusable UI primitives including buttons, inputs, cards, badges, labels, and separators for consistent UI design and accessibility.
user_flow_summary: User visits landing page with hero screen and clicks to start quiz hub.
User selects a preset quiz or configures a custom quiz using toggle groups and saves it to localStorage.
User starts the quiz which loads the configuration from URL query or localStorage and displays interactive questions.
User answers questions in chosen mode with immediate feedback, correction prompts if enabled, and optional audio cues.
User navigates between quiz, landing, and cheat sheet pages using navigation buttons and links.
User toggles sound and theme preferences, which persist across sessions.
User uses keyboard shortcuts for navigation and advancing through questions.
User accesses conjugation cheat sheet for reference and returns to quiz seamlessly.
validation_criteria: Application correctly loads and applies preset and custom quiz configurations.
Quiz questions generate valid items matching user-selected settings and answer validation handles variants.
Answer submission validates correctness, triggers correct feedback or correction sequence when enabled.
Sound mute state and theme preferences persist after reload and reflect user toggles.
UI elements render correctly with appropriate accessibility labels and support keyboard navigation.
Navigation flows between home, quiz, and cheat sheet pages function as expected with state persistence.
LocalStorage and URL query parameter abnormalities are handled gracefully without breaking user flow.
Core quiz features and UI components have full unit and integration test coverage with passing results.
Performance benchmarks met including fast question generation and smooth animations.
Error scenarios such as invalid configs and empty questions display appropriate messages and fallback behaviors.

features.name: Landing and quiz hub navigation
features.description: Renders hero screen, transitions into quiz hub, and provides top-level navigation with sound/theme controls.

features.name: Quiz route client shell
features.description: Loads preset/custom config from query params and localStorage, then mounts the interactive quiz session.

features.name: Quiz preset and custom builder
features.description: Displays preset cards by category and supports user-defined custom quiz settings persisted in localStorage.

features.name: Interactive quiz engine
features.description: Builds random questions, supports multiple question modes, validates answers, provides correction flow, and advances rounds.

features.name: Japanese conjugation logic
features.description: Implements verb/adjective conjugation rules, target labels, accepted answer variants, and input normalization.

features.name: Cheat sheet reference page
features.description: Provides static grammar/conjugation reference content for verbs and adjectives with quick rules and examples.

features.name: Sound state and effects
features.description: Persists mute state, broadcasts mute changes, and plays feedback/transition audio in quiz and landing screens.

features.name: Theme toggle
features.description: Stores light/dark theme preference and applies root class for client-side theming.

features.name: Reusable UI primitives
features.description: Provides local button, input, card, badge, label, and separator components for consistent UI composition.
